user.title: Govee API Key
user.description:
Enter your Govee Developer API key from {api_url}

This is NOT your Govee account password - it's a separate developer key.

data_description.api_key: The API key from your Govee Developer account (a long string of letters and numbers)

account.title: Govee Account (Optional)
account.description:
For real-time updates, enter your Govee mobile app credentials below.

**Important:** Use the email and password from the Govee mobile app. The app password may be different from the Govee website password.

To skip this step, leave both fields empty and submit.

data_description.email: The email address you use to sign into the Govee mobile app
data_description.password: The password you use to sign into the Govee mobile app (not the website)

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Govee
reauth_confirm.description: Your API key is invalid. Please enter a new one.

verification_code.title: Govee Verification Code
verification_code.description: A verification code has been sent to **{email}**. Enter the code below. The code expires in approximately 15 minutes.

data_description.verification_code: Check your email for a code from Govee

data_description.api_key: Your Govee Developer API key from developer.govee.com
data_description.email: Email for Govee mobile app (leave empty to remove MQTT)
data_description.password: Password for Govee mobile app (leave empty to keep existing)

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Check that you're using the developer key from developer.govee.com, not your account password.
error.invalid_account: Invalid Govee app credentials. Make sure you're using the password from the Govee mobile app (not the website).
error.invalid_api_key_format: API key appears invalid. It should be a long string (36+ characters) from developer.govee.com.
error.invalid_email_format: Please enter a valid email address.
error.password_without_email: Please enter both email and password, or leave both empty to skip.
error.email_without_password: Please enter both email and password, or leave both empty to skip.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Govee API. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_verification_code: Invalid or expired verification code. Please check your email and try again.
error.login_rejected: Govee rejected the login request. This may indicate a temporary server issue — please try again later.

init.title: Govee Options
init.description: If you have RGBIC devices, per-device segment settings will appear after submitting.

data_description.api_temperature_unit: Auto (default) converts known Fahrenheit-reporting thermometers (H5179, H5109, H5110, HS5108, HS5106) automatically. Choose Fahrenheit if another thermometer reads about 1.8× too high (e.g. 74 instead of 23), or Celsius to force no conversion. Govee's API omits unit metadata, so the value can't always be auto-detected.
data_description.enable_groups: Surfaces the device groups you created in the Govee app as single light entities. A command to a group is sent once and synced to all members by Govee's cloud, so it syncs better than grouping the lights with Home Assistant helpers. State is best-effort (groups can't be polled), and group lights only support power/brightness/color.
data_description.enable_mqtt_control: Routes power/brightness/color commands through Govee's MQTT channel instead of the REST cloud API, reducing latency and bypassing REST rate limits. Requires email/password login (MQTT credentials). Falls back to REST automatically when MQTT is unavailable. Experimental — uses an undocumented channel; leave off if commands behave unexpectedly.
data_description.lan_targets: Only needed when LAN-enabled Govee devices are on a different subnet/VLAN than Home Assistant, so the local discovery scan can't reach them. Enter a comma-separated list of device IPs (10.20.0.51), broadcast addresses (10.20.0.255), and/or subnets in CIDR (10.20.0.0/24, /24 or smaller). Subnets are scanned device-by-device since most routers drop cross-VLAN broadcasts. Leave blank if all devices share Home Assistant's network.

select_segment_devices.title: Select Segment Devices
select_segment_devices.description: Choose which RGBIC devices to configure segment modes for.

configure_device_mode.title: Segment Mode: {device_name}
configure_device_mode.description: Choose how segments are created for **{device_name}** (`{device_id}`): **disabled** creates no segment entities, **grouped** creates a single entity for all segments, **individual** creates a separate entity per segment.

error.invalid_lan_targets: One of the LAN device addresses is not a valid IP, broadcast address, or subnet (/24 or smaller). Example: 10.20.0.51, 10.20.0.255, 10.20.0.0/24

refresh_scenes.name: Refresh Scenes
refresh_scenes.description: Refresh available scenes from the Govee API

set_segment_color.name: Set Segment Color
set_segment_color.description: Set color for specific segments on RGBIC devices

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: Device ID of the RGBIC light

auth_failed.title: Govee authentication failed
auth_failed.description: The API key for {entry_title} is no longer valid. The integration cannot communicate with Govee until you re-authenticate.

rate_limited.title: Govee API rate limited
rate_limited.description: The Govee API has rate limited requests for {entry_title}. Normal operation will resume in approximately {reset_time}. Consider increasing the poll interval in the integration options to reduce API calls.

mqtt_disconnected.title: Govee MQTT disconnected
mqtt_disconnected.description: Real-time updates for {entry_title} are unavailable. Reason: {reason}. The integration will continue to work using polling. Check your Govee account credentials if this persists.

mqtt_2fa_required.title: Govee account requires verification
mqtt_2fa_required.description:
Your Govee account now requires email verification (2FA) to enable real-time MQTT updates for {entry_title}. Go to the integration page and select **Reconfigure** to re-enter your credentials with a verification code.

The integration will continue to work using polling until this is resolved.
